label: Ritual outcome comp (ritual seat present)
description: Applies qualityOffset based on the number of ideo-specific ritual seats present relative to the number of spectators.

label.label: Label
label.description: Display label shown in the ritual quality breakdown UI.

labelAbstract.label: Label (abstract)
labelAbstract.description: Alternative label used when no live ritual is available.

qualityOffset.label: Quality offset
qualityOffset.description: Quality offset contributed per seat relative to spectator count.

curve.label: Curve
curve.description: Optional SimpleCurve; not typically used by this variant.
